text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP allows machines to grasp the meaning behind text. For example, translation tools use NLP to convert sentences between languages accurately. Sentiment analysis is another application, where computers detect whether a piece of writing is positive, negative, or neutral. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to have natural conversations with users, answering questions and providing assistance. Thanks to NLP, computers are getting better at interpreting our words and responding in helpful ways.
